new_tasks.title: Non-clinical pay uplift -- assess HR Systems impact
new_tasks.description: Jasmin Khokhra has kicked off the non-clinical pay uplift project. With main holiday season approaching, calendars are filling up quickly. Kevin needs to assess what HR Systems involvement is needed and flag resource or scheduling constraints to the team.

new_tasks.title: SHSMS Evaluation -- review Christopher's legal compliance requirements
new_tasks.description: Christopher Sanders has sent requirements relating to legal compliance from yesterday's SHSMS evaluation session. Kevin needs to review and incorporate these into the weightings and scoring for DTP1334.
